mapper.select: SELECT t.type_code, t.project_code, p.project_name, t.type_name, t.par_type_code, t.start_at, t.end_at, t.is_deleted, -- 부모 이름 가져오기 (SELECT pt.type_name FROM types pt WHERE pt.type_code = t.par_type_code) AS par_type_name, LEVEL FROM types t JOIN projects p ON t.project_code = p.project_code WHERE t.is_deleted != 1 AND p.status != 'OD2' START WITH t.par_type_code IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR t.type_code = t.par_type_code ORDER SIBLINGS BY t.type_code

SELECT i.issue_code ,i.title ,c.code_name ,u.name ,progress ,COUNT(*) OVER() as total_cnt FROM issues i JOIN common_code c ON i.priority = c.code_id JOIN users u ON i.assignee_code = u.user_code WHERE type_code = #{typeCode}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(type_code), 0) + 1 FROM types
INSERT INTO types (type_code, project_code, type_name, par_type_code, start_at, end_at, is_deleted) VALUES ( #{typeCode}, #{projectCode}, #{typeName}, #{parTypeCode}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, '0' )
mapper.update: UPDATE types SET type_name = #{typeName}, project_code = #{projectCode}, par_type_code = #{parTypeCode}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt} WHERE type_code = #{typeCode}
UPDATE types SET is_deleted = '1' WHERE type_code = #{typeCode}
